section_title: When a promise is to be performed without application by the promisee,
content:
49. When a promise is to be performed without application by the promisee,
performance
and no place is fixed for the performance of it, it is the duty of the promisor to
of promise
were no apply to the promisee to appoint a reasonable place for the performance of
application
the promise, and to perform it at such place.

place fixed

A undertakes to deliver a thousand maunds of jute to B on a fixed day. A
performance
must apply to B to appoint a reasonable place for the purpose of receiving it,
and must deliver it to him at such place.
